name: Halo: The Fall of Reach
overview: Kidnapped as children and conscripted into a brutal military training and augmentation program, the Spartans were designed to be the ultimate weapon against chaos and insurgency—but when a dangerous alien alliance known as the Covenant declares war on humanity, the Spartans might be our only hope.

trailers.title: Halo: The Fall of Reach Official Trailer 1 (2015) - Animated Movie HD
